'''鈭歴-w-p-ng''' ('''kasawpengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quat|quat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-w-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quat|quat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-w-p-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kasawpengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisawpengoko|thisawpengoko]] || [[word:jisawpengoko|jisawpengoko]] || [[word:shisawpengoko|shisawpengoko]] || [[word:kisawpengoko|kisawpengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙sawpengoko|th忙sawpengoko]] || [[word:j忙sawpengoko|j忙sawpengoko]] || [[word:sh忙sawpengoko|sh忙sawpengoko]] || [[word:k忙sawpengoko|k忙sawpengoko]]
|-

|-

|-
